entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : The document could not be opened
entry.content:
Got the reports... Thank you

I know why but I can't explain why sometimes they seem to work.

Also noted is the report history is current versions of CRD, it's not the original report or they are so old there is no history:

The first error is:

@txtpckdes : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :
... text removed for privacy ....
UFL 'u2ltext' that implements this function is missing.

That UFL was one used in CR 7 and was located in c:\windows\Crystal. CR updated the UFL text functions and built them into the Designer so the UFL was no longer used/needed nor was it installed with later versions of CR or higher.

Customer needs to fix their reports and delete the Formula fields that used them. note it's not used so if they are not using the formula then delete them.

The next error is in a current UFL:

NOTE: You and I may get this error because we don't have the UFL the customer is using so when we view the report it will cause errors.

If they go into the Formula Editor and expand this they can see what the UFL name is:

The next error is likely due to we don't have the U212 UFL either.

@INTITULES : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :... text removed for privacy ....
UFL 'u212itext.dll' that implements this function is missing.

Same as above, fix or delete the formula.

There are others so no need to list them here, likely the customer needs to fix the reports.

And as you noted there are references to Database fields that do not exist:

@Codbardivpren : Used: 0 times'End'
Error in formula :
... text removed for privacy ....
This field name is not known.
Details: errorKind

Typical because the DBA may have modified the Tables used and deleted them. CR keeps a copy of the fields used in the Reports at the time of creation.

Same can happen if they add fields to the DB.

So once again the owners of the reports needs to fix them by clicking on each formula and then the X+2 button to verify the formula. It will either error indicating the field is not found or a Field Mapping UI will pop up for the user to repoint the offending field and they are able to redirect it to a new field.

And as noted for the UFL if the formula is not required then just delete the formula.

There is no button you can you do to fix them all at once, someone is going to have to open each report and fix them manually.

You can explain to the Customer that CR Designer is a design tool so it does allow Report Designers to save "bad" references. For example the designer was half way through a formula and it was time to go home so they just saved the report intending to "fix" it later, but then forgot to...

Same with the database updates, likely someone never told them they can't update the Database without updating the Reports by clicking Database... Verify Database. It's the nature of CRD, CRD always "assumes" when the reports are saved they are 100% accurate....

To sum up:

Have the customer check their reports and UFL's used, if the Formulae fields are not used then delete them. Be sure to back up all Report first just in case.

Check with their DBA to verify those missing fields are removed and/or it's possible for security reasons, CRD fully supports DB security, if the User running the reports does not have specific permissions to view the report accessing restricted tables they will get a Database error.

Hope that helps.

Don

entry.title: Re: Generic Object Services (GOS) Attachments for Business Partner - Version 2
entry.content:
Hi Andi,

nice to see you blogging here 🙂 I recently had an issue with a custom GOS implementation that used an explicit COMMIT. This resulted in a OS_COMMIT_TOP_FAILED Dump, but only in BP transactions. Other transactions seemed running just fine.

Turned out that by deferring the COMMIT using "in update task" I was able to circumvent this.

That being said, Do you by chance know how I would have needed to deal with the issue, had I not being able to defer the explicit COMMIT? I read about Object Services but admit that it seems a rather exotic framework ;)#

Cheers

Jens

entry.title: EBS Search String Target field for Payment order in S/4HANA not working, can anyone help
entry.content:
hello there,

I am trying to configure a Search string for a payment order which comes from F110 but so far now lack. There is not much information on this topic specifically to Payment Order and even more specific what is the target field I can use. 

The payment order I can see in field REGUP-VBLNR, but unsure what target field I should select in order to read the payment order, and post the amount against the order and so I can achieve automatic clearing, rather having to go through F-53 and do it manually.

your help would be most appreciated, the posting rule I am using is 

Do you see anything wrong here, A100 is my main bank account

here you can see the Search string 

 

I have tried using Interpretation algo 29 - Payment Order, but that is not working the result i get is this

To me it seems I am not using the correct target field, but I have tried most available, Eternal Ref, etc the same result.

I would like to achieve automatic clearing of the Payment Order, using the MT940 Bank Statement filed 86

Thank you in advance, I am on S/4HANA on premise version but should not matter

#SAP #Searchstring #Paymentorder

entry.title: Re: Issue Bank Guarantee – Trade Finance – Treasury - TRM
entry.content:
Hi all, I wonder, why for the postings the charge is relevant but not the fee which is linked to the bank guarantee. For that a payment is done, but it does not show up in the posting. Instead in the Cash Flow the fee has the comment: Payment without posting. What is the purpose for this?

Regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: How to Edit Multiple Selected Items Individually in a...
entry.content:
@ArianH

build your own fragment and use your selected lines. You can trigger it by table toolbar buttons:

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
Hello 

1. Correct If I have 4 cores , I would have to find a Deployment that uses that 4 cores. So likely the free acccount can not offer that.

2. About the IP's to insert:
2.1 Which IP to write Private or Public?
2.2 are  these Ip's to assign to the deployment , for example If I put 192.168.30.50 Is this Ip for the S4HANA machine? or
2.3 The Range of IP is for the machines that can connect to the deployment

entry.title: Dynamic YoY Story Calculation - SAC
entry.content:
Hello,
I need to calculate YoY for YTD, QTD, and MTD. Since my reports are dynamic, it's essential to display the period at the top of the table. This makes it impractical to create restricted calculations like "QTD Current" & "QTD Previous."

I’ve used an advanced filter to set up a dynamic period (see below), but I’m unsure how to create a dynamic YOY comparison (restricted?) calculation. I need both a percentage and an amount difference. (Using the "YOY" formula in the measure, only works for yearly values.)

also, I don't want to use a "client calculation" on the table because it will require to recreate it every month/quarter/year as the time passes.

How can I achieve this?

Thanks

entry.title: Operation Reporting API - Default Filter for Full Access
entry.content:
Hi,

We are having issues with Filter, Could you please help.

Requirement is we should be able to filter by UniqueNames, but optional. if we don't provide UniqueNames, other date filter should be applied.

Question:

Is it must to maintain "UniqueNames" in the filter expression when creating View Template?

if not, how to use filter for Unique Names.

if yes, how to provide default value in viewtemplate which should pull everything (Like "*" in SELECT Statement)

Example syntax:

       {
            "name": "UniqueName",
            "field": "UniqueName",
            "op": "=",
            "defaultValue": "*"
        }  

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: The structure for <FS_ZVK_STVAL> = L_EXT_VALUE is C_S_DATA.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: BAdI RSROA_OLAP_BADI is not available to me in the current support pack the company is on. InfoProvider is correct. Inititalize code is standard except for an if statement at the top. method IF_EX_RSR_OLAP_BADI~INITIALIZE. IF I_S_RKB1D-COMPID IS NOT INITIAL AND I_S_RKB1D-COMPID = 'ZQ_TD_0IC_MP04_Q002'. DATA: l_global_name TYPE string. FIELD-SYMBOLS: <l_global> TYPE i, <l_s_sfc> TYPE rrkg_s_sfc, <l_s_sfk> TYPE rrkg_s_sfk. * there's no need to change this method * Just create attributes for each characteristic * with name P_CHA_<characteristic> TYPE i. * and constants for each key figure with name * P_KYF_<key figure> TYPE i. CLASS cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi DEFINITION LOAD. * get field postions for characteristics in structure LOOP AT i_th_sfc ASSIGNING <l_s_sfc> WHERE user_exit NE rrke_c_mode-none. * field name in structure is keyreturnnm * name of the global variable CONCATENATE 'P_CHA' <l_s_sfc>-chanm INTO l_global_name SEPARATED BY '_'. * fill the global variable UNASSIGN <l_global>. ASSIGN (l_global_name) TO <l_global>. CHECK <l_global> IS ASSIGNED. <l_global> = cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi=>get_field_position_d( i_fieldnm = <l_s_sfc>-keyreturnnm i_s_data = i_s_data ). ENDLOOP. LOOP AT i_th_sfk ASSIGNING <l_s_sfk> WHERE value_returnnm IS NOT INITIAL. * field name in structure is keyreturnnm * name of the global variable CONCATENATE 'P_KYF' <l_s_sfk>-kyfnm INTO l_global_name SEPARATED BY '_'. * fill the global variable UNASSIGN <l_global>. ASSIGN (l_global_name) TO <l_global>. CHECK <l_global> IS ASSIGNED. <l_global> = cl_exm_im_rsr_olap_badi=>get_field_position_d( i_fieldnm = <l_s_sfk>-value_returnnm i_s_data = i_s_data ). ENDLOOP. ENDIF. endmethod.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
entry.content: The value of P_KYF_ZVK_STVAL during dump is a structure. I did have a check in before to check the field symbol type. It doesn't dump in BW production. It just continues to the next record.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/Key Figures BADI
entry.content: Here is the Define section:method IF_EX_RSR_OLAP_BADI~DEFINE. data: l_s_chanm type rrke_s_chanm, l_t_chanm type rrke_t_chanm, l_s_kyfnm type rsd_kyfnm, l_t_kyfnm type rsd_t_kyfnm. IF I_S_RKB1D-COMPID IS NOT INITIAL AND I_S_RKB1D-COMPID = 'ZQ_TD_0IC_MP04_Q002'. case i_s_rkb1d-infocube. when '0IC_MP04'. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0MATERIAL'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0PLANT'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0BATCH'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0VENDOR'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0WBS_ELEMT'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0MATERIAL__0MATL_TYPE'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. l_s_chanm-chanm = '0PLANT__0COUNTRY'. l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. clear l_s_chanm. * l_s_chanm-chanm = '0DF_SOBKZ'. * l_s_chanm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. * append l_s_chanm to c_t_chanm. * clear l_s_chanm. * clear l_s_kyfnm. * l_s_kyfnm = '0TOTALSTCK'. ** l_s_kyfnm-mode = rrke_c_mode-read. * append '0TOTALSTCK' to C_T_KYFNM. ** clear l_s_kyfnm. ** l_s_kyfnm = 'ZVK_STVAL'. *** l_s_kyfnm-mode = rrke_c_mode-no_selection. * key figure REFRESH c_t_kyfnm. CLEAR l_s_kyfnm. l_s_kyfnm = 'ZVK_STVAL'. APPEND l_s_kyfnm TO c_t_kyfnm. CLEAR l_s_kyfnm. endcase. ENDIF. endmethod.

entry.title: Re: Unify your process and task mining insights: How SAP UEM by Knoa integrates with SAP Signavio
entry.content: Is SAP going to acquire and embedd KNOA in C/4HANA and Signavio next year, since it will be a strategic decision for customers as well in terms of ROI and TCO long term?

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA public cloud business user creation questions
entry.content:
What are the differences and limitations between the SCIM API and the Business User SOAP service for creating business users? Based on the documentation, both seem capable of creating business users, provided the worker ID is already present and passed. However, are there specific limitations to consider? Additionally, is there any indication that SAP plans to deprecate the SOAP-based service in favor of SCIM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA public cloud business user creation quest...
entry.content:
• SCIM is an industry standard, i.e. SAP will be focusing more on the SCIM interface in future.
  • Both services (SCIM and SOAP) can create business users and assign business roles. The difference is:
    • the SCIM interface can additionally create business user groups
    • the SOAP interface can only assign business user groups

Currently there are no plans to retire the SOAP service because it has too many different consumers.

entry.title: Error when checking package SMLT - Language installation
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are attempting to install the languages PL (Polish), FR (French), and IT (Italian) in our SAP BW (7.50) environment with EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 / NW7.50 (ERP 6.18).

Following the official SAP notes 330104 - Transport requests used for language delivery // SRx, for downloading the required DVDs for the languages, and the official note 3129901 - Which language is contained in each language media for EHP8 for SAP ERP 6.0?, we proceeded to download the required DVDs for installing the new languages.

We followed the steps in the official SAP guide by activating the new languages in transaction I18N System Configuration and then adding the files FRSAPKLFR618GAERP608F0.PAT (French), ITSAPKLIT618GAERP608F0.PAT (Italian), and PLSAPKLPL618GAERP608F0.PAT (Polish) to the path /usr/sap/trans/EPS/in/ at the OS level. Afterward, I accessed transaction SMLT, went to Language > Special Actions > Import Support Packages, and upon importing the package, it is detected with an error:

...

Package State: 0001, System State: 0020
Check Component WEBCUIF
Package State: 0001, System State: 0019
Package State: 0001, System State: 0019
Error when checking package

(see log file attached for entire log)

In principle, these are the packages that should be used, but I do not understand the reason for the error.

I located the following SAP note 2689175 - You got "Error when checking package" when you install some language packages, where it indicates our error and the following resolution: 

2 - For cause 2, choose the correct language package or upgrade the support package in the target system to the proper release.

What packages do we need to launch the installation?

Regards, 

Chanchai T.

entry.title: Re: How to change Time zone in Cloud ALM.
entry.content:
Hello,

Since Oct 16, 2024 it is possible to configure the Time Zone for Email and Chat Notifications in Intelligent Event Processing.

You can specify the time zone for email and chat notifications. When configured, the reporting time stamps in the notifications for Send Email to and Send Chat Notification event actions are displayed in the configured time zone.

To configure the time zone,

  1. Open the Intelligent Event Processing app.

  2. Navigate to Configuration  Application Settings  Time Zone.

  3. Select the preferred time zone in the Time Zone for Email and Chat Notifications dropdown.

  4. Choose Save.

For more information on configuring application settings, refer Application Settings.

You can check it further on KBA 3337151 - SAP Cloud ALM for Operations alert e-mails appear delayed when comparing alert/metric timestamps with value in the source service/system

entry.title: Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Notifications from SAP
entry.content:
Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Notifications from SAP about planned and unplanned downtimes, as well as customer communication notifications from SAP.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Users who are no longer IT Contacts receive Email Not...
entry.content:
When an IT contact is created, they do not receive email notifications from SAP; after an IT contact is created, they must subscribe to the CSNS to receive the notifications.

As CSNS is designed as a self-service system, creation of IT contact is not directly proportionate to the subscription. If the user is no longer an IT contact, then they must unsubscribe from CSNS in order to stop receiving SAP E-mail notifications.

If you have an s-user, please directly unsubscribe from unwanted email notifications in me.sap.com as shown below.

If you do not have an s-user, please contact your Super Admin.

IMPORTANT NOTE:

  1. For IT contacts, it is mandatory to subscribe for CSNS once the Email ID is maintained under contact type. Else the customer will not receive any notifications from SAP.
  2. Users who have S-User ID can access CSNS.
  3. Customer can access CSNS from  SAP for Me or Cloud Availability Center or CSNS Direct Link.
  4. CSNS is designed as self-service, so the customer will have to maintain it or remove it from their end.

entry.title: Re: Field-Symbol Behavior in BW Virtual Characteristics/K...
Re: chaRM functionality road map on Cloud ALM

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Wien 05.12.2024
entry.content:
Ein gemütlicher Abend in lockerer Runde - zum zwanglosen Austausch über Themen rund um SAP und mehr.
Von der SAP Community, für die SAP Community

Tritt der Gruppe Wien bei und subscribe den Blog-Post SAP Stammtisch Wien, um über zukünftige Events informiert zu werden!

entry.title: Re: Character are doubled when exporting Report to PDF wi...
entry.content:
That is odd, Ubuntu is a Linux font so it's odd that CR would even find it.

Are you running CR Designer in a Windows image on Linux?

All CR fonts must be TTF fonts, sounds like they are doing something strange.

As noted, don't use that font...

A quick Google search doesn't find and font names Ubuntu for windows, it does find how to install Windows fonts on Linux.

CR will try to embed the font into the PDF, one way to check is open the exported PDF and click on Properties...Fonts. it should show you what font it is and/or if font substitutions are being applied.

entry.title: Re: Payment order clearing with EBS in SAP
entry.content: I am also on the same boat, I can not get the 029 Payment order String to clear my blocked document. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Error when checking package SMLT - Language installation
entry.content: You should compare with your "installed software component versions". You have shown only the "installed product versions", it's meaningless here.

Gianluca

entry.title: Re: Migrating from CR9 nowadays

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher Reminder (BusinessProcessSteps) in Query and Business rules
entry.content:
I see!
You can try querying the businessProcessStepAssignments of your Activity (i.e., businessProcessStepAssignments[0]), and check its value by looking at the "completed" property (i.e., businessProcessStepAssignments[0].completed), either true or false.

entry.title: Re: Feasibility of Attaching Document in Mail Notificatio...
entry.content:
Hi @SatishPanda ,

Based on your request I've found below KBA:

2615287 - Unable to add Attachment Field to Alert Message - https://me.sap.com/notes/2615287/E

Unfortunately above KBA informs that attachments are not allowed on alert messages, but it suggests that it's possible to host a file on your behalf through PLT Product support Team, and then put the URL into your alert.

Please check all the information contained in the KBA and confirm if this works for you.

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner Duplicate Check
entry.content:
I've had a really long search before i've found this blog. Thanks so much for this. 

Wish SAP can find a way to better reference these kind of blogs in Google. 

Cheers.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Sphere - Replication Flow
entry.content:
@sharmaar I believe the space would not be considered while loading data via replication flow.

There are two ways i could think at the moment.

1. Import all the data including Null values to a local table, after that filter the null values in a graphical view.

2. If we need to import the data without NULL at beginning step, data flow would be another option to filter the data with a projection as shown below

Hope this helps.

thanks

Lokesh

I have created new Semantic tag group, semantic tags and attached them to GL accounts in FSV created.

Now when I am  trying to use them in custom analytical query in the restricted measure Semantic tag field, unable to find semantic tags created by me, I can see standard values here.

whether I am missing any step? Why custom tags are not appearing in analytical query?

entry.title: Re: how to implement to method IF_EX_FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGN...
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi 

I implemented this enhancement, but it is not called by the transaction fagl_it_02

the badi is the one you told me: FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGNMENT

entry.title: Re: Last Used Date for a Procedure in SAP HANA
entry.content:
As a starting point, would this work for you

select statement_string, last_execution_timestamp, * 
from M_SQL_PLAN_CACHE
where upper(statement_string) like 'CALL%CHESSBOARD%';

assuming you call procedures via the `CALL` statement and the schema in this example is the `CHESSBOARD`.

Greetings

Björn

entry.title: Re: Node JS Recursive Hierarchy Support and Fiori Tree Ta...

entry.title: IBP Inventory Optimization: Optimization Horizon
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I've been testing the optimization horizon setting in the Inventory Profile. According to the SAP Help then the  Optimization Horizon is: "... the time period (in weeks) from which forecast inputs are used in your inventory optimization plans".

Based on that I was expecting some sort of fixed safety stock, or repetition of the recommended safety stock outside of the optimization horizon (while within the planning horizon). But when I change the Optimization Horizon, then I'm getting vastly different results, also on the very short term (week 1 and forward).

I understand that if I set the optimization horizon to less than the flow-through lead time, then no demand/std dev will be propagated through the network.

But for a product with 4 weeks of flow-through lead time, I experience different results on recommended safety stock if I choose 52 or 104 weeks Optimization Horizon (Planning Horizon = 104) - the result differs with about 20%.

Can anyone explain how I should interpret the Optimization Horizon, and how come it has such a big impact on even short term recommendation?

entry.title: Re: Behavior of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation after Clearing
entry.content:
Dear @Anoop_Kandathil_Jose , 

thanks for your comment and Advanced Valuation related question. 

Since the Advanced Valuation is not integrated into the clearing process, the statistical posting is required for further reporting purposes. We already started to analyze possible scenarios to avoid the statistical posting. If a concrete plan has been made it will be shared on the SAP Roadmap Explorer. 

Thanks for your interests in Advanced Valuation. 

Thank you,

Kevin

entry.title: Re: OOPS! we faced an issue processing your request in DM...
entry.content:
Did you try adding Document Management Service, Repository Option entitlement?

https://help.sap.com/docs/document-management-service/sap-document-management-service/onboarding-repository

entry.title: Re: Use product lifecycle management in ABC XYZ segmentation
entry.content: As I understand it, then the system will use the reference product data along with the products data it self, in order to calculate and determine the ABC/XYZ value - not transfer the MD from the reference to the new.

entry.title: Re: Behavior of Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation after Clearing
entry.content:
Dear @S0025222448 , 

in the example AR is used as the maintained reconciliation account of the BP. Hence, the system will similar to postings made onto AP accounts.

If I interpret your sentence " [...] the final valuation system is NOT clearing the remaining open items (delta posting) on AP / AR accounts from previous valuations." correctly: This will not happen, all previous valuation postings will remain, even after the clearing. This is the purpose of the delta posting logic (compared to the reversal posting logic). We talked to some customers which didn't agree at first, but with the individual account determination in the Advanced Valuation related customizing we could meet the customer requirements. Please take this into consideration.

Thank you for your interest in the Advanced Valuation, we really appreciate that. 

Kind regards, 

Kevin

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan Scheduling Parameters explained + examples
entry.content: Top, great job.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA EHS Incident Management issue: task creat...
entry.content:
Hi, have you had a look at SAP Note 2897861 - Fix for second task instance created for non-recurring task definition - SAP for Me

Its a note released in 2020 but may be useful to check it.

You haven't specified but is this a new implementation or upgrade of S/4HANA?

Also have you checked in transaction SWIA whether the workflow generates two workflows for the task when it is created?  I would also have a look just for in case. 

#SAP EHS Incident Management

entry.title: Re: Stock not moving into In-transit storage location at O4G1 - Loading confirmation
entry.content:
Here’s a concise, step-by-step guide with transaction codes (T-codes) to address the issue:

  1. Check "Bypass In-Transit Storage Location at Loading" Flag
    T-code: SPRO → IMG → Logistics Execution → Shipping → Shipment Types → Define Shipment Types.

    • Ensure the "Bypass In-Transit Storage Location at Loading" flag is unchecked if you want stock to move into the in-transit location.

  2. Verify In-Transit Posting Group (TU)
    T-code: SPRO → IMG → Materials Management → Inventory Management → Goods Movement → Define In-Transit Posting Groups.

    • Confirm that the In-Transit Posting Group (TU) is correctly mapped.

  3. Check Fixed Storage in In-Transit Location
    T-code: SPRO → IMG → Materials Management → Inventory Management → Storage Locations → Define Fixed Storage.

    • Ensure that the fixed storage location capacity for TU is not exceeded.

  4. Review Movement Type for In-Transit Posting
    T-code: OMJJ

    • Verify that the correct movement type (e.g., 301 or 303) is configured for the stock movement to in-transit.

  5. Material Master Check
    T-code: MM03

    • Review the material master data to ensure that the material is allowed to be posted to the in-transit storage location.

  6. Check Warehouse Management (if applicable)
    T-code: SPRO → IMG → Extended Warehouse Management → Define Storage Types.

    • If using EWM, verify the storage type and bin for in-transit.

entry.title: Re: SAP CTRM: Streamlining Commodity Management
entry.content: Great insights into SAP CTRM! It's amazing how it streamlines the entire commodity management lifecycle, from procurement to risk mitigation. The continuous innovations, like the Commodity Hedge Cockpit and trade finance integration, are sure to enhance efficiency and risk management. A must-have solution for anyone in the commodities space! #SAPCTRM #CommodityManagement #RiskManagement

entry.title: HDI Container Issue
entry.content: Whenever I add @CDS.persistence.exists above the entity I will get HDI failed error why? can anyone explain this please I have also created the calculation view if i try to deploy it to the DB then also same error comes .please provide me the solution.

entry.title: Re: Audit trail for opening and closing financial periods
entry.content: you posted this over 6 years ago, but is exactly what i was looking for today, thanks

entry.title: Re: 🇳🇱 Event-driven integrations with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh (Zoetermeer, NL)
entry.content: Thank You  🙂

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there an ETA on when we'll be able to de-link/map attribute types from one proficiency scale in TIH to another? Or is there a way to do this already that I'm just unaware of? This is causing some problems for a customer who would like to change their scale but cannot re-map an attribute that was already mapped to an old scale. And the attribute MUST be the Skills attribute because these skills must be able to be mapped in Job Profile Builder to roles. 

Best,

Kristy

entry.title: Update on Reference Solution Architecture for SAP Master Data Governance
entry.content:
The initial version of the reference solution architecture for master data management with SAP Master Data Governance was published last year (see blog). 

🎉Now there is an update available! 🎉

This updated version includes new solution variants for SAP Master Data Governance on SAP S/4HANA in classic mode and in cloud-ready mode. One of the key highlights of this release is the inclusion of detailed diagrams for business partner, product, and financial domain for master data governance in classic mode. 

💡For further information on the updates check out the blog post: Update on Reference Solution Architecture for SAP Master Data Governance.

 

Kind regards,
Christina Lindner

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
You are not selecting the IP of the deployment - it will be selected by Azure. You create a restriction who will have access the deployment.
If you want to restrict it to your own IP only, you need to put your public IP with mask 32. It is like 1.2.3.4/32 (192.168.30.50 is private address).

entry.title: Re: Migrating from CR9 nowadays
entry.content: Then you did not look at any of the linkns I posted above. You have to download the EXE for your version of Visual Studio. Once you do that then you'll see them

Regards

entry.title: Outbound Internet Traffic Tunneling From RISE to On-premises
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is it possible to force all RISE outbound internet traffic to client's on-premises firewall?
The client wants to be able to analyze and protect every traffic in front of SAP, be sure that every external traffic is going through their Fortigate (Like CPI, API, ADS or anything else).

Thank you,

Andre

entry.title: FSD Currency different for Different Stage
entry.content:
Hello All

Is it possible to have different Currency per stage in Case of Rule 11 for Rail?

For Example

Stage 1= Carrier A has Rate amount in "CAD" as the move is within Canada but the document Currency is USD ( Purchase Org is of US as end destination is US associated with currency USD)

Stage 2 =Carrier B has rate amount in USD and the document currency is USD

Requirement is that for Stage 1 the FSD should be posted in "CAD"

entry.title: Re: Focussed Run - How to create a consolidated report of Guided Procedure Execution Output?
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep

I can confirm to you that you cannot download the report in xlsx format, but while creating a guided procedure plan you have a provision to specify how the report should be generated (single/multiple attachments)

entry.title: SAP BYD OutboundDelivery by OData API missing Notes
entry.content:

I'd like to extract OutboundDelivery data by OData API and use something like khoutbounddelivery from the GitHub examples. I struggle with the Notes (like Internal Comment, Customer Information ...) though. I tried to use the TextCollection (similar to the example in khpurchaseorder - which works) but only get empty arrays.

Am I missing something here? Do I need a different BO?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Unleashing ABAP Potential: An introduction to Extension Libraries (XCO)
entry.content:
Pro tip: when you ask ChatGPT to generate the next blog text, ask it to include some reference links.

I've never heard of XCO and had to google it. I'm guessing it's this: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/xco-library

I'm still not very clear on what it is / does exactly. SAP document is very cryptic. For example, it says "The Cloud Platform (CP) edition of the XCO library" but is there another edition? If yes, then where is documentation for it? Also, why is it called "Cloud Platform" edition when Cloud Platform was renamed to BTP? Too many questions...

entry.title: Re: Combining On-Premise System OData and CAPM OData in a Single Fiori Application
entry.content: include both odata in app? what does that mean? merge the data? or just make call to different service?

entry.title: Re: Stock not moving into In-transit storage location at O4G1 - Loading confirmation
entry.content: Thank you so much. I configured same earlier and it worked.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now context ID not being captured when recordi...
entry.content:
Hi,

The Standard profile typically indicates that the application functionality that you are recording is a desktop application, although I note that you mention that you have installed the browser extensions, and there is no specific profile for that application.  If it is a desktop application, the context is actually captured differently to browser-based applications such as Fiori apps.

If the application that you are recording is a desktop application, the context is recorded on the individual screens of the Simulation.  This is the way that contextual information is managed for SAP Companion for Desktop, rather than SAP Companion.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in People Story reports
entry.content:
Hi @Aneta_Krysiak 

It's difficult to tell without knowing the specifics of the template especially if the currency conversion table has not been static. The ability for the table to compute inverse rates is standard system functionality for the compensation module. Which rate is used depends on how the template is configured to use functional or local currencies as the database value. I'm not 100% sure but I would assume if your worksheets are completed and the currency conversion table has been updated since, the data that is finalised in the completed form and the currency rates may no longer match. You can test this in your test instance with a new table or by launching new forms with the existing table. Leading practice is to create a new currency conversion table each year for each new template for data consistency and audit purposes. If you are looking to use specific rates in your report and not the rate configured for the data in the template, then I suggest you hard code the rates in your formula in report stories.

Thanks,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Issue creating Template in SAP Cloud Appliance
entry.content:
Hi Eduardo,

You have to ensure Azure subscription with higher quota. This is probably not possible with your free account. You can check that with Azure documentation or Azure customer support.
Quota in Azure is not paid. It is pay per use – you start paying after the appliance is created. SAP Cloud Appliance Library will give you a cost forecast when you are starting the appliance.

Correct, this is public IP, you will access your appliance via its public IP, otherwise you need VPN.
If you want to limit to IP 100.200.100.100, you have to write 100.200.100.100/32.

Regards,
Nikola

entry.title: Re: MDG BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In receiver internal ID
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for these explaination.

In step 1, as per standard setting, the soap launch the creation of a BP because it points to storage.

You change the setting, to switch from "storage" to "stagin" to initiate a CR rather than create a BP.

May I ask you where/how do you switch the soap from "storage" to "staging" ?

Thank You very much,

Karim

entry.title: Pros and Cons of having one SAP BTP ABAP subaccount connected to multiple backend systems
entry.content: Is it recommended to have one BTP ABAP subaccount for one backend S4 system? Or can we have multiple S4 backend systems connected to one BTP ABAP subaccount together? What are the pros and cons of each approach.

entry.title: Re: Unleashing ABAP Potential: An introduction to Extension Libraries (XCO)
entry.content:
Hi @Jelena_Perfiljeva, @BjörnS,

Since, I am just a technology evangelist and not a literary maestro I did sought some help from my friendly machine assistant to help me articulate the content. But as you have correctly pointed out, the assistant has gone ahead and changed the parts which it could not understand. ( Code has been corrected) 

Well to answer your questions with the onset of 2-tier and 3-tier development for partners and customers, we need to understand that SAP wants to guide us to a more restricted environment for development where it is advisable to use only released APIs (classes) for development. This can raise a genuine doubt as to where is the restriction and how does it affects us. Well specifically in partner development scenarios you would want to build a product (add-on) which would be able to run on an On-Premise solution and as well as on steampunk a.k.a. ABAP environment on BTP. There are probably two options to achieve this. The simplest and extensive way is to have separate code base for both the landscapes and the more robust way to have a agnostic solution or code-base which runs on both the environments, i.e., on-premise as well as ABAP environment on BTP. Once you start developing on the ABAP environment on BTP you would find that a lot of standard SAP provided APIs are not permitted for use, for example you are not allowed to query DD03L table and others. Hence in such situation you would need help of the released APIs like the XCO (Extension Component) libraries. Hope this gives you a better brief on the topic. 

Next regarding different editions, there are basically two extension scenarios on ABAP environment, i.e., KU or key user extension and CP or cloud platform extension. Therefore, you would find all the classes either starting with XCO_CP_* or XCO_KU_*. Apart from this there is another standard extension scenario which starts with XCO_* but is neither followed with CP or KU. Example: XCO_JSON, XCO_KU_JSON, and XCO_CP_JSON.

The link to the XCO Library reference for CP is provided in the above comment. However, I am still providing the link to available editions XCO Library for Key User Extensibility XCO Library for BTP 

💡Let’s exchange ideas! What’s your favorite feature or use case of XCO? Share your thoughts in the comments. 👇

entry.title: Re: Transform Your GenAI-Based BTP Experience: Digital Assistant with Data Learning & Adaptive P
entry.content: Thank you @SreekanthKrishn for putting out this detailed blog post about a real customer use case and how to leverage SAP BTP Generative AI Hub to create business value for your customer! Feel free to use the SAP AppHaus methods that are available for everyone to identify further Business AI use cases with our Explore & Discover workshop format: https://apphaus.sap.com/toolkit/methods

entry.title: Migrating from SAP BW to Datasphere: Using 2LIS_13_VDHDR and 2LIS_13_VDITM Data Sources for Delta
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We are currently using SAP BW 7.3 and are in the process of transitioning to SAP Datasphere. However, we are not planning to use the Data Bridge in our migration strategy.

In our current setup, the source system for BW is SAP ECC. Going forward, the source system for SAP Datasphere will be SAP S/4HANA.

at present In BW, we use the standard InfoCube 0SD_C03 to extract sales information. The data flows into this InfoCube through standard extractors 2LIS_13_VDHDR and 2LIS_13_VDITM, which asupports the delta-extraction from SAP ECC to BW.

My questions are as follows:

  1. Can the same extractors (2LIS_13_VDHDR and 2LIS_13_VDITM) be used directly in SAP Datasphere to extract delta records from SAP S/4HANA? if yes.. how to enable?
  2. Does SAP Datasphere provide any standard views or models that replicate the Exact functionality/fields of the mentioned extractors or InfoCube 0SD_C03?

I would appreciate guidance on whether there are standard approaches or recommendations for implementing such delta-supported scenarios in SAP Datasphere, especially when transitioning from BW.

Thank you.

SKS

entry.title: LucaNet Consolidation integration with SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to integrate LucaNet consolidation system with SAP Business ByDesign, LucaNet consultant mentioned this can be done via webservice directly.

Understand that there are several SOAP web service options available, appreciate if someone can advise which option is required?

We need to provide the URL for the Lucanet connector interface setup, and ensure access to the following webservices in order to extract the financial data - 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Example URL: 

https://myxxxxxx.sapbydesign.com/sap/bc/srt/scs/sap/queryjournalentryin?sap-vhost=myxxxxxx.sapbydesign.com

Thanks for the advice in advance!

Nicole

entry.title: A custom web service to post functional acknowledgement to Application Interface Framework of S/4
entry.content:
Introduction

Recently SAP released several SOAP APIs (e.g. Order Confirmation, Customer Invoice and Outbound Delivery) for B2B scenarios, and standard interfaces of SAP Application Interface Framework (AIF) were also delivered by SAP accordingly. The APIs and AIF interfaces could be leveraged in B2B integration instead of using classical IDOC framework.

However, there is one general requirement in B2B integration, which is receiving functional acknowledgement from receivers (external business partners). In classical IDOC framework ALEAUD could be used, processing results could be sent back via IDOC ALEAUD and update the status of original outbound IDOCs accordingly (e.g. status 11 and 12).

In my blog, I would like to provide a similar solution like ALEAUD for those SOAP APIs, hereby customers could still receive functional acknowledgement when leveraging “modern” APIs in B2B scenarios.

Solution Design Concept

In AIF, there is a standard solution for Error Forwarding from Cloud Integration to S/4HANA, via a web service Error_Propagation_Request_In, errors in Cloud Integration could be posted in the Message Monitoring of AIF. But the web service is for inbound AIF interfaces, in case of a message to be posted in S/4HANA but get failure in Cloud Integration, the errors could be posted to AIF as an error message of the relevant AIF interface, so the service always creates a new AIF message with “technical error”.

In my solution, which is receiving acknowledgement for outbound scenarios, I would create a custom web service by reusing the same message type of standard Error_Propagation_Request_In, within the service implementing class I’ll call the same class (/aif/cl_enabler_cpi) called in the standard service, but update the existing outbound AIF message with the status and logs passed in the service payload.

Service Definition

Firstly, create a custom web service definition via transaction SPROXY_START. One of prerequisite is creating a custom namespace via transaction SPXNGENAPPL under Backend Metadata Repository:

In SPROXY_START, create a service provider by using “Create with WIZARD” (Shift+F5):

After completing the wizard, a custom web service has been defined (in my case the service was named Application_Acknowledgement_In):

Go to tab “Internal View”, create an operation via “Add Operation” (right click menu), and then “Set Request” and assign standard Message Type Error_Propagation_Request, “Add Fault” and assign standard Fault Message Type Error_Propagation_Fault, the service definition is completed. Save and activate the service.

Next, navigate to the auto-generated implementing class, adding below codes to the method:

  METHOD zii_application_acknowledgemen~application_acknowledgement.
*** **** INSERT IMPLEMENTATION HERE **** ***
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF lty_msg_long,
        msgv1 TYPE symsgv,
        msgv2 TYPE symsgv,
        msgv3 TYPE symsgv,
        msgv4 TYPE symsgv,
      END OF lty_msg_long.
    DATA:
      lr_enabler_cpi TYPE REF TO /aif/cl_enabler_cpi,
      lr_system_uuid TYPE REF TO if_system_uuid,
      lv_uuid        TYPE sysuuid_c32,
      lv_status      TYPE /aif/proc_status,
      lv_msg_status  TYPE /aif/proc_status,
      ls_log_message TYPE bal_s_msg,
      ls_bal_context TYPE /aif/bal_context,
      ls_msg_long    TYPE lty_msg_long.

    DATA(ls_ep_message) = VALUE /aif/ep_message(
            message_processing_log_id = input-error_propagation_request-message_processing_log_id
            mpl_correlation_id        = input-error_propagation_request-mpl_correlation_id
            application_id            = input-error_propagation_request-application_id
            tenant_name               = input-error_propagation_request-tenant_name
            iflow_id                  = input-error_propagation_request-iflow_id
            namespace                 = input-error_propagation_request-namespace
            interface_name            = input-error_propagation_request-interface_name
            interface_version         = input-error_propagation_request-interface_version
            error_message             = input-error_propagation_request-error_message
            ).

    lv_uuid = input-error_propagation_request-application_id.
    lv_status = ls_ep_message-error_message+0(1).

    TRY.
        CREATE OBJECT lr_enabler_cpi
          EXPORTING
            iv_msgguid   = lv_uuid
            iv_ns        = ls_ep_message-namespace
            iv_ifname    = Ls_ep_message-interface_name
            iv_ifversion = ls_ep_message-interface_version.

        DATA(lt_log_message) = lr_enabler_cpi->prepare_log_messages( ls_ep_message ).
        DELETE lt_log_message FROM 1 TO 2.
        DELETE lt_log_message WHERE msgty = 'I' AND msgno = '005'.
        ls_msg_long(113) = ls_ep_message-error_message.
        IF lv_status EQ 'S'.
          lv_msg_status = 'I'.
        ELSE.
          lv_msg_status = lv_status.
        ENDIF.
        ls_log_message = VALUE bal_s_msg( context-tabname = '/AIF/BAL_CONTEXT' context-value = ls_bal_context msgid = '/AIF/CPI_INTEGRATION' msgty = lv_msg_status msgno = '006' msgv1 = ls_msg_long-msgv1 msgv2 = ls_msg_long-msgv2 msgv3 =
ls_msg_long-msgv3 ).
        INSERT ls_log_message INTO TABLE lt_log_message.

        TEST-SEAM call_base_enabler_update.
          CALL METHOD lr_enabler_cpi->/aif/if_enabler_base~update
            EXPORTING
              iv_message_status_flag = lv_status
              it_log_messages        = lt_log_message
              iv_user_name           = cl_abap_syst=>get_user_name( )
              iv_create_date         = sy-datum
              iv_create_time         = sy-uzeit.
        END-TEST-SEAM.
      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lr_root).
        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /aif/cx_error_propagation_faul EXPORTING previous = lr_root.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.

Comments: To save effort I was using /aif/cl_enabler_cpi->prepare_log_messages to prepare log messages, in actual implementation you could create your own log messages without using the method.

Test Scenario

You could publish the web service via SOAMANAGER so it could be called by soapUI or any applications/middleware, below are explanations of how to fill the payload:

MessageProcessingLogID and MplCorrelationID - if you’re using Cloud Integration to call the service, those IDs are from the Cloud Integration message, standard Error Propagation service stores the IDs to avoid duplicate posting, here since we’re updating the existing AIF messages, those IDs could be dummy.

ApplicationID – I use the field to store the original outbound message ID, the outbound messages pass the message ID in the message header, receivers have to store the ID and pass it back in the acknowledgement, it is mandatory for the solution.

TenantName and IFlowID – if you’re using Cloud Integration, those are information of your tenant and iFlow to call the service, if you’re not using Cloud Integration, those fields could be dummy

Namespace, InterfaceName and InterfaceVersion – the AIF interface which the original outbound messages are belonged to.

ErrorMessage – I’m assuming the error message returning in format <status>:<logs>, <status> has to be one of the AIF message status (W/S/E/A) which would be used to update the status of original AIF messages.

Note: payload of standard Error Propagation service was explained in the blog for your reference.

For my test case, I had a message (000003) sent to the receiver successfully:

Then assuming the receiver return an error with below payload:

After posting the message shown with application error in AIF message monitoring:

Summary

This blog post gave an introduction on building a custom web service to receive functional acknowledgement from external receivers/middleware for outbound AIF messages and update the message status and logs in AIF Message Monitor. This is a very simple implementation just for reference and therefore more comprehensive and standardized implementation required in actual project.

entry.title: Re: The data is not getting updated in the DB, on executing CAP Odata V4 service from SAP UI5 App
entry.content: Hi, The app (mtar) is deployed to CF. it is a trial account though. Need to test the scenario through UI5 app to create record in the table.

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture and how to get started

Hi there

Thanks for the feedback, it’s much appreciated!

If you like my blogs then please follow me for more.  I also conduct expert deep dive sessions for those who are interested.

entry.title: #CoE#BUMA - Item price has not changed in the catalog Error upon creation of Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi,

We attempted to populate the material number using the BAdI (MMPUR_OCI_ITEM_TRANSFER_DATA - Change of OCI 4.0 Data When Mapping to a Purchase Requisition Item), but when trying to place an order through the external catalog and completed the details in Purchase requisition app then clicked "Create" PR, we received an error message stating, "The price for item 00010 has changed in the catalog. Update item price." Please note that this material number has an associated Purchasing Info Record.

Is there a way not to encounter this error and proceed with the creation of PR?

Regards!

John

entry.title: Re: IDOC Structure - Field level detail
entry.content:
I run WE02 to see the field descriptions for the segments. Where can I see what the columns represent in the idoc itself?

I see this information, which isn't entirely useful. 

How does it map to the Number and Application Data columns in the iDoc. How do I know what each row (number?) and value represent?

entry.title: SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition)
entry.content:
Hello experts, do you know what is the purpose for this SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition.)

In the  UnofficialPAM the description is a License, and the customer has a BOM with this SKU: do you have some examples? the BOM only includes this SKU (related to HANA EE)

8017496SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private editionUpsellLicenseGeneric Private CloudUpgrades HANA use rights of S/4HANA Enterprise Management. Please note that customer may require Data Provisioning Agent in most cases (already included with S/4HANA EM and installed on-demand basis).
XSA is included on request only.

and yet this SKU mentions that the DP agent is included by default.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Query in Sap b1 Hana with parameters
entry.content:
Hi @ramco1917 ,

You can take help from the below post.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sap-b1-hana-query-with-date-parameter-in-variable/qaq-p/13916446 

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content:
Hi Imran_94,

According to the screen shot, the error happens to the license in ABAP system (T-code: slicense), not HANA DB. So you may need to request a new valid license for ABAP system.

Below KBA describes a different scenario, but I think you can still refer to the steps there.
2413104 - How to replace a license key for hardware exchange (hardware key changed)

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Data Services encountered an error while reading real...
entry.content: you can find more details of Real-time Jobs in this document https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/e54136ab6a4a43e6a370265bf0a2d744/5739433a6d6d1014b3fc9283b0e91070.html?q=real+time+job

entry.title: Re: How to Create Workflows that Require Multilevel Approval
entry.content:
Hello Alice, 

Thank you for your sharing. I have one question. 

There is a requirement to request for approval on 1 group containing with 3 recipients. If 2 of 3 recipients have approved, then PO will be released. However if only 1 person approves and 2 person reject the PO, then PO status will be rejected. 

Currently in flexible workflow only have 2 options of step to be completed : one of the recipients or all the recipients. But now the requirement is 2 of 3 approve the PO, the PO status will be released. 

Regards,
Fenny

entry.title: Re: SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Ext...
entry.content: Hi, The aforementioned error when creating a document template has been resolved, but it is still not possible to use the Extract data (pre-trained model) option in automations. I tried to build two projects and they both get stuck at the data extraction point.

entry.title: Integration Suite - Standard Edition - Multiple Tenants
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My question: Can we purchase more than one tenants for Standard Edition in Integration Suite?

I have checked SAP Note (https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776) and it says other than Premium Edition being 4 tenants granted, the other editions, standard edition and basic edition included, only have 1 tenant.

However, on SAP's website, it implies that every edition is applicable for additional tenants.

So, are we able to purchase multiple tenants for basic/standard edition?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: /SCWM/ISU can't post with external amount
entry.content:
Hello,

As per 2021 Released for EWM we can posting migration stock with amount. I've tried to input this amount but no material document is created. How to resolve this ?

 

Best regards,

 

EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Re: How can I restrict certain rows from being completely uneditable in maintenance view?
entry.content: I'm not sure if this requirement can be achieved through events, but I have basically implemented this function through PBO, although it is not perfect.

entry.title: Re: Tile cannot be loaded in SAP Build workzone, standard edition. Error while loading Component.js
entry.content:
Thanks Mio.

This helped to resolve my first error as well. I was getting similar error, and adding section property "sap.cloud" in manifest.json loaded the app. However, there is another problem, the metadata file is not loaded ! In console, the error is .... Failed to get contexts for ../lcapbomcap.comdassapbomcustomerenquiry/~8809a3d6-8196-4551-9763-47f8a3a8e9d8~/service/bomCapService/CustomerEnquiry with start index 0 and length 100 - Error: Could not load metadata: 500 error at Object.createError (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.130.2/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:2322:3887) Is this due to difference in version of manifest.json ((minimum UI5 mentioned)) and Build Workzone runtime ? If that is the case, then how to ignore the UI5 version ?

Thanks, Varad

entry.title: Re: How to restrict some fields from editing like Amount...
entry.content:
Hi JPIND,

According to product help

The MIRO app will be replaced by the successor app Manage Supplier Invoices (F0859). I would recommend that you can check related authorization objects in IAM if it can meet your request.

Br, Bob

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order creation via Excel upload
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Add digital signature in Purchase order form in sap public cloud
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Does anyone know what information needs to be prepared when connecting the Indeed job posting?
entry.content:
When we check the Indeed job board in the manage recruiting posting, they only need to provide the name and the duration of the job offer. Unlike other job boards, no special client ID is needed so I am wondering if there is extra information that we need to prepare. Is there anyone that can share their successful experience? Thanks.

Best Regards,

Bella.

entry.title: Re: Add additional recipients to the email notification when a Purchase Requisition is approved
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: How to read environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to read the environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task. But so far as we know, we can only read Custom Variables, Process Inputs, Process Metadata and API data...

Is there any solution to get environment variable in Script Task? Thank you.

Best regards,
Weiss

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Digital Skills Innitiatives
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano

I hope you are doing well. I recently learned about your Digital Skills Initiative and am truly inspired by the opportunities it offers.

Living in Pakistan, I have limited access to programs like this due to financial challenges, but I am deeply committed to learning and growing. This course aligns perfectly with my career goals, and I am confident it will equip me with the digital skills needed to secure better job opportunities and make a positive impact.

If given the chance, I will dedicate myself wholeheartedly to the program and apply the knowledge effectively in my professional journey. Thank you for considering my request, and I hope to be part of this incredible initiative.

Best regards,
[Amna Bashir ]
[About AmnaT123 - SAP Community]
